name: Powdered Sugar Replacement
recipeInstructions:
Combine all ingredients in a food processor or blender. Process until well blended and powdered. Transfer to an airtight container.
Recipe Yield: 4 cups replacement for use in making desserts. Diabetic exchange: 1 bread or 1/2 nonfat milk & 1/2 bread. Calories for 1/4 cup: 81. Source: Diabetic Dessert Cookbook
